reviews.author: harpreet kaur jass
reviews.review_body: Lovely school and ambience.. if you are looking for a progressive env for your child. This is the place...

reviews.author: HINA GULATI
reviews.review_body:
This is a school with a difference....
Children actually fall in love with this school after becoming a part of their learner community. It not only instills love for learning but also prepares them to become a balanced human being. The best way to learn is  through experiential learning and this is what Prakriti does.......The school leaders have tremendous experience in Education sector and every minute detail has been rightly put into action. If you actually want your child to be different in all respects ......no second thought for Prakriti.....It is the BEST place for your child!!!

reviews.author: Vivek Saini
reviews.review_body:
A school with a difference, not a traditional school.

Other school focus only on bookish education, whereas Prakriti believes that Mind Body and Soul all three needs to be in prime shape to become a better human being.

One of the school where on Parents works with school as part of community for well-being of everyone.

They pay individual attention to every child in a way that is commendable.

Thanks Prakriti to be what u r, please always stay true to yourself.

reviews.author: Priti Umamahesvaram
reviews.review_body:
Prakriti has been a space where every day is breathed with love and attention for children, since I moved in as a facilitator a few months ago.

The joyous faces of the children blending in with the relaxed atmosphere of the school is how every school should be.

A home away from home, where learning is natural and in sync with the everyday experiences of life.

Education at Prakriti is organic and wholesome which is reflected in the deep learning of a subject rather than rote or superficial information gathering. Believe me, a lot of hard work goes in the sensitive selection of material that is given to the children to imbibe.

I am grateful to the management of Prakriti for allowing me to be a part of this beautiful heaven of learning.

reviews.author: Sumit Rai
reviews.review_body: My brother in law's daughter has been studying in this school for some time. I am very happy to see her progress. Unlike typical schools they try to harness the natural talent of the child and attempt a holistic development rather than just Scholastic development. I am also getting my daughter admitted in the same school. They have a good day care as well
